holdings.infoBox: FSCS is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Valmont Industries stock at 1.33%, Cabot at 1.22%, Neurocrine Biosciences at 1.22%, A10 Networks at 1.21%, and Cohen & Steers at 1.18%.

overview.description: The First Trust SMID Capital Strength ETF (FSCS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the The SMID Capital Strength index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 100 well-capitalized small- and mid-cap US companies perceived to hold strong market positions. FSCS was launched on Jun 20, 2017 and is issued by First Trust.
